Fertitta Entertainment, Inc. (Restaurants, Casinos, Hotels, Amusements, Professional Basketball, Event Venues, Commercial Real Estate (Retail), Commercial Real Estate (Office)

Fertitta Entertainment, Inc. (“FEI”) is a holding company engaged primarily in the business of Hospitality and Real Estate, including restaurants, hotels, casinos, amusement and entertainment venues.  FEI operates its business through the subsidiaries listed below:  1337 Third Avenue, LLC, 1567 Bway Restaurant Associates, LLC, 1600 West Loop South, LLC, 1626 Broadway LLC, 200 S. "Shut Up and Listen!: Hard Business Truths that Will Help You Succeed", HarperCollins Focus LLC (value not readily ascertainable)
I will receive a lump sum payment from my employer deferred compensation plan following my resignation in accordance with the terms of the plan. (2004-01-01)

As the controlling shareholder of Fertitta Entertainment, Inc., I have access to, and use of, company goods and services and company properties.  Upon resignation from my positions, I will enter into a contract with Fertitta Entertainment, Inc., and Fertitta Entertainment, LLC, to continue to provide access to, and use of, company goods and services and company properties to me for either a fixed annual fee based upon prevailing market rate or their out of pocket expenses. (2010-01-01)
I am eligible to receive a severance payment from Fertitta Entertainment, LLC, but I have elected to waive this payment. (2010-01-01)

Fertitta Entertainment currently pays the life insurance premiums on the universal life survivorship policy of which I am a contingent beneficiary. If I am confirmed, I will assume responsibility for paying the premiums. (2002-12-01)
